summaryForNext: Phase COMPLETE: 4/4 goals MET, 4/4 changes archived, workspace green (352 core + 5 e2e, 0 failed), zero new crates. Separated security-review caught 5 HIGH fail-open/escalation defects pre-archive (all fixed): token-exchange fail-open provider selection + unpinned-issuer JWT; NHI route-level authorize coercing NHIs to User + skipping revocation (+ proactively hardened client_id kind-spoofing via signed flint_kind marker); client-creds introspection oracle mitigated. Top tech debt: /oauth/token + /oauth/introspect are UNAUTHENTICATED + unrate-limited on the proxy port. Recommended next phase: agent-gateway-hardening-and-exposure — endpoint auth + rate-limiting for the OAuth surface FIRST (gates safe exposure), then argon2 secrets, close identity-classification edges (api-key->Service, Kratos self-service, transactional audit), then RFC 8693 chained delegation + Hydra-delegate token-exchange.
